\\t\\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\\n216: \\t\\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\\n217: \\t\\treturn resp, nil\\n218: \\t} // end rule loop\\n219: \\n220: \\treturn resp, nil\\n221: }\\n222: \\n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\\n224: // on the match type.\\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\\n226: \\tconstraintMatches := 0\\n227: \\n228: \\tvar reason string\\n229: \\n230: \\tfor _, c := range constraints {\\n231: \\t\\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\tvar (\\n234: \\t\\t\\tmatch bool\\n235: \\t\\t\\terr   error\\n236: \\t\\t)\\n237: \\n238: \\t\\tswitch c.Type {\\n239: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n240: \\t\\t\\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\\n241: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n242: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\\n243: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n244: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\\n245: \\t\\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n246: \\t\\t\\tmatch, err = errs.ErrInvalid(\\\"unknown constraint type\\\")\\n251: \\t\\t}\\n252: \\n253: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n254: \\t\\t\\te.logger.Debug(\\\"error matching constraint\\\", zap.String(\\\"property\\\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\\n255: \\t\\t\\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif match {\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// increase the matchCount\\n260: \\t\\t\\tconstraintMatches++\\n261: \\n262: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n263: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n264: \\t\\t\\t\\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n266: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\\n268: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n269: \\t\\t\\t}\\n270: \\t\\t} else {\\n271: \\t\\t\\t// no match\\n272: \\t\\t\\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n273: \\t\\t\\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n274: \\t\\t\\t\\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\tbreak\\n276: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n277: \\t\\t\\t\\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\\n278: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n279: \\t\\t\\t}\\n280: \\t\\t}\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\n283: \\tvar matched = true\\n284: \\n285: \\tswitch segmentMatchType {\\n286: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n287: \\t\\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\\n288: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ALL constraints\\\"\\n289: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n290: \\t\\t}\\n291: \\n292: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n293: \\t\\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\\n294: \\t\\t\\treason = \\\"did not match ANY constraints\\\"\\n295: \\t\\t\\tmatched = false\\n296: \\t\\t}\\n297: \\tdefault:\\n298: \\t\\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"unknown match type %d\\\", segmentMatchType)\\n299: \\t\\tmatched = false\\n300: \\t}\\n301: \\n302: \\treturn matched, reason, nil\\n303: }\\n304: \\n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\\n306: \\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\\n307: }\\n308: \\n309: const (\\n310: \\t// totalBucketNum represents \\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\\n334: \\t\\treturn value == v\\n335: \\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\\n336: \\t\\treturn value != v\\n337: \\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\\n338: \\t\\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), \\n355: \\treturn false\\n356: }\\n357: \\n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n359: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n360: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n361: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\\n362: \\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\\n363: \\t\\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\\n364: \\t}\\n365: \\n366: \\t// can't parse an empty c.Property), zap.Error(err))\\n255: \\t\\t\\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\\n256: \\t\\t}\\n257: \\n258: \\t\\tif match {\\n259: \\t\\t\\t// \\n355: \\treturn false\\n356: }\\n357: \\n358: func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\\n359: \\tswitch c.Operator {\\n360: \\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\\n361: supporting SegmentKey.\n153: \t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n154: \t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take \n161: \t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n162: \t\tif err != nil {\n163: \t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n164: \t\t\treturn resp, err\n165: \t\t}\n166: \n167: \t\tvar (\n168: \t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n169: \t\t\tbuckets            []int\n170: \t\t)\n171: \n172: \t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n173: \t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n174: \t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n175: \t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n176: \n177: \t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n178: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n179: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n180: \t\t\t\t} else {\n181: \t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n182: \t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n183: \t\t\t\t}\n184: \t\t\t}\n185: \t\t}\n186: \n187: searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n198: \t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n199: \t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n200: \t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n201: \t\t)\n202: \n203: \t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n204: \t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n205: \t\t\tresp.Match = false\n206: \t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n207: \t\t\treturn resp, nil\n208: \t\t}\n209: \n210: \t\td := validDistributions[index]\n211: \t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n212: \n213: \t\tresp.Match = true\n214: \t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n215: \t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n216: \t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n217: \t\treturn resp, nil\n218: \t} // end rule loop\n219: \n220: \treturn resp, nil\n221: }\n222: \n223: // matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n224: // on the match type.\n225: func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n226: \tconstraintMatches := 0\n227: \n228: \tvar reason string\n229: \n230: \tfor _, c := range constraints {\n231: \t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n232: \n233: \t\tvar (\n234: \t\t\tmatch bool\n235: \t\t\terr   error\n236: \t\t)\n237: \n238: \t\tswitch c.Type {\n239: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n240: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n241: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n242: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n243: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n244: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n245: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n246: \t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n247: \t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n248: \t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n249: \t\tdefault:\n250: \t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n251: \t\t}\n252: \n253: \t\tif err != nil {\n254: \t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n255: \t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n256: \t\t}\n257: \n258: \t\tif match {\n259: \t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n260: \t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n261: \n262: \t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n263: \t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n264: \t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n265: \t\t\t\tbreak\n266: \t\t\tdefault:\n267: \t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n268: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n269: \t\t\t}\n270: \t\t} else {\n271: \t\t\t// no match\n272: \t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n273: \t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n274: \t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n275: \t\t\t\tbreak\n276: \t\t\tdefault:\n277: \t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n278: \t\t\t\tcontinue\n279: \t\t\t}\n280: \t\t}\n281: \t}\n282: \n283: \tvar matched = true\n284: \n285: \tswitch segmentMatchType {\n286: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n287: \t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n288: \t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n289: \t\t\tmatched = false\n290: \t\t}\n291: \n292: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n293: \t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n294: \t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n295: \t\t\tmatched = false\n296: \t\t}\n297: \tdefault:\n298: \t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n299: \t\tmatched = false\n300: \t}\n301: \n302: \treturn matched, reason, nil\n303: }\n304: \n305: func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n306: \treturn flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":214,"oldLines":6,"newStart":214,"newLines":7,"lines":["     resp.Value = d.VariantKey","     resp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment","     resp.Reason = {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\tresp.SegmentOperator = rule.SegmentOperator\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of
